category_sources: Official GNU Netcat homepage describes it as a networking utility for TCP/IP connections, debugging, exploration, tunneling, and port scanning.
source_facts.description says utility for managing network connections.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is The GNU Netcat official homepage.
docs_sources: Official homepage links further information in README/ChangeLog and the official PDF manual is hosted on the same project site.
source_facts.homepage is the official GNU Netcat project homepage.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge Code page for The GNU netcat shows the project source tree with HTTPS and svn access.
source_facts.repo was empty, so official SourceForge source-control project URL was determined.
tags_sources: Official GNU Netcat homepage describes TCP/UDP connections, tunneling, port scanning, and command-line networking use.
